name: grill-adapter
description: Host-agnostic Claude Code/Codex plugin that adds sectioned/cross-repo project wiki (Disclose/Carry/Bind/Capture), Lanhu requirements intake, and source-of-truth verify/lint as standalone skills + hooks — no host skill is ever patched. Defaults to grill (mattpocock/skills) as the front-end; also runs on a plain coding-agent workflow.
_comment: Plugin manifests declare the component inventory. This manifest only maps each runtime and workflow host to the convention block install.py writes into a target project's durable instruction file.
